is an annual Indian classical music festival held in the month of January at [Nazrul Mancha](/wiki/Nazrul_Mancha "Nazrul Mancha"), an indoor 2400 seat auditorium in south Kolkata.

Noone, Mathew (July 2013). ["North Indian Classical Music and the Kolkata Experience"](http://www.ictm.ie/wp-content/uploads/2013/08/ICTM-journal-Noone.pdf) (PDF). *Ethnomusicology Ireland*: 27. Retrieved 4 November 2021.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Indian classical music festival

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Dover_Lane_Music_Conference "Special:EditPage/Dover Lane Music Conference") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["Dover Lane Music Conference"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Dover+Lane+Music+Conference%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Dover+Lane+Music+Conference%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Dover+Lane+Music+Conference%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Dover+Lane+Music+Conference%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Dover+Lane+Music+Conference%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Dover+Lane+Music+Conference%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(March 2017)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

| The Dover Lane Music Conference | |
| --- | --- |
| Performance at the Dover Lane Music Conference | |
| Genre | [Classical](/wiki/Indian_classical_music "Indian classical music") |
| Dates | January 22nd to 25th/26th |
| Locations | [Nazrul Mancha](/wiki/Nazrul_Mancha "Nazrul Mancha"), [Kolkata](/wiki/Kolkata "Kolkata"), [India](/wiki/India "India") |
| Years active | 1952 - Present |
| Website | [doverlanemusicconference.org](http://doverlanemusicconference.org/) |

**The Dover Lane Music Conference** is an annual Indian classical music festival held in the month of January at [Nazrul Mancha](/wiki/Nazrul_Mancha "Nazrul Mancha"), an indoor 2400 seat auditorium in south Kolkata.
The Dover Lane Music Conference is an all night concert attended by visitors from all over the world. It typically showcases vocal recital, sitar, sarod, and violin music.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Dover_Lane_Music_Conference&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

The festival derives its name from the fact that it originally took place at a location on Dover Lane courtesy the patronage of Late Sri Narendra Singh Singhi at his residence, Singhi Park.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
